creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to samm from comment #1)

This PR has maintainer-feedback+ in the comment above and patch would only need to be supplemented with a PORTREVISON bump.

Since it's only the periodic script there's no build-time QA should really needed.  It builds on everything now.  See:

http://portsmon.freebsd.org/portoverview.py?category=sysutils&portname=smartmontools
